payload.title: Diversity Committee Meeting
payload.description: Diversity Committee Meeting book for February 18, 2021 covering business and diversity initiatives, DBE certification, EEO activities, small business development, MWDBE/SDVOB contract compliance, capital projects, financial services, asset fund managers, and EEO/Title VI policy statements.
